name: claude-code-multi-model
description: Multi-model orchestration plugin for Claude Code — Ollama cloud, NVIDIA NIM, NVIDIA Security, GitHub Copilot CLI, Codex.

scripts.check-all: npm run gen-docs && npm run check-copilot-drift
scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log('[multi-model] deps installed. Run npm run gen-docs to refresh MODELS.md.')"
